## Problem Statement
A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.
Example: "As a doctor, I struggle with..."

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Which Module Does This Affect?
- [ ] Auth
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Patients
- [ ] Appointments
- [ ] Laboratory
- [ ] New Module
- [ ] Other

## Who Would Benefit?
- [ ] Admin
- [ ] Doctor
- [ ] Nurse
- [ ] Laboratory Scientist
- [ ] Receptionist

## Additional Context
Add any mockups, screenshots, or references here.
